message:
Command `
echo "=== Checking FINAL directory ==="
ls -la "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/final/" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== Full run dir listing ==="
ls -la "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/" 2>/dev/null | head -10

echo ""
echo "=== OpenROAD still running? ==="
ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print "PID:"$2, "CPU:"$3"%", "RSS:"$6/1024"MB", "TIME:"$10}'
ORPID=956540
cat /proc/$ORPID/status 2>/dev/null | grep -E "(State|VmRSS|Threads)" || echo "Process $ORPID not found"
` executed with exit code 0.
